title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
